macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Market Closes at 2026 Lows Amid Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: All three major US indexes fell to their lowest closes of 2026, with the S&P 500 dropping 0.6% to 6,632.19, the Nasdaq Composite sliding 0.9% to 22,105.36, and the Dow Jones declining 0.3% to 46,558.47. Weakness was driven by oil hovering around $100 and ongoing Iran conflict concerns keeping stagflation worries alive.

items.title: Tech Sector Leads Market Decline as Volatility Spikes
items.summary: Technology stocks significantly underperformed, with the Information Technology Select Sector SPDR falling 1.8%, while Consumer Discretionary and Industrials sectors dropped 2.3% and 2.5% respectively. The VIX volatility index surged to 29.49 during the week, reflecting heightened market uncertainty.

items.title: Honda Warns of First Annual Loss in Nearly 70 Years
items.summary: Honda tumbled 5.6% after warning of its first annual loss in nearly 70 years as a listed company, contributing to broader weakness in Asian markets where the Nikkei 225 fell 1.2% and the Hang Seng dropped 1.0%.

items.title: US Durable Goods Orders Flat, Defying Recession Expectations
items.summary: New orders for manufactured durable goods remained unchanged month-over-month in January, beating the consensus estimate for a 0.3% decline. December's figure was revised upward to a 0.9% decline from an initially reported 1.4% decline.

items.title: Treasury Yields Rise Despite Downward GDP Revision
items.summary: US fourth-quarter GDP was revised downward, yet Treasury yields still rose, creating an unfavorable mix for equity investors as stagflation concerns persist amid elevated oil prices.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Continues Relief Rally as RSI Moves Away from Oversold Zone
items.summary: Bitcoin is experiencing a relief rally with positive technical signals on the weekly chart. The RSI indicator is moving away from oversold conditions, suggesting potential for further upside movement in the coming days.

items.title: Clarity Act Faces Tight Timeline for 2026 Passage
items.summary: According to Galaxy Digital's Alex Thorne, the crypto market structure legislation (Clarity Act) must pass committee by end of April to have reasonable odds of passage in 2026, with Senate floor time running out.

items.title: NASDAQ Developing Framework for Tokenized Stocks
items.summary: NASDAQ is creating a framework allowing publicly listed companies to issue blockchain-based versions of their shares. In partnership with Payword (parent of Kraken), tokenized stocks are expected to launch in the first half of 2027.

items.title: ICE Makes Strategic Investment in Crypto Exchange OKX
items.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) announced a strategic investment in crypto exchange OKX at a $25 billion valuation, with plans to launch tokenized stocks and crypto futures.

items.title: Major Altcoins Confirm Bullish Rebounds
items.summary: Multiple altcoins including Ethereum, XRP, Solana, Chainlink, and Dogecoin are confirming bullish rebounds on daily and weekly timeframes, with XRP reaching $147 and Ethereum at $22.85.

items.title: Bitcoin Rally Expected into Late March
items.summary: Technical analysis suggests Bitcoin rallies are expected into late March, potentially aligning with stock market movements and following a 60-year cycle pattern.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Rice University Hosts First-of-Its-Kind AI Workshop for DUNE Experiment
items.summary: Rice University convened an international workshop with 60 participants and 30 presentations focused on integrating AI and machine learning into the DUNE high-energy physics experiment. Researchers discussed using AI to detect rare signals in massive datasets, automate detector monitoring, and optimize experiment operations.

items.title: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang Announces Next-Generation AI and GPU Technology
items.summary: NVIDIA's CEO unveiled the company's latest breakthroughs in AI, accelerated computing, data centers, robotics, and next-generation GPUs at the GTC developer conference. The keynote covered new GPU architectures, AI infrastructure, and enterprise solutions.

items.title: Award-Winning Robotic Fish Demonstrate Deep Learning for Marine Research
items.summary: H-SURF autonomous underwater robots equipped with lightweight convolutional neural networks achieved 0.78 mean average precision in real-time marine species classification. The robots demonstrated collaborative multi-agent reinforcement learning for complex underwater tasks without external server connections.

items.title: AWS Names Five Universities as Regional Leads for AI Training Initiative
items.summary: Amazon Web Services selected Delaware State University, Howard University, Alabama A&M, City Colleges of Chicago, and Oklahoma City Community College to lead regional AI and machine learning education efforts. The program includes bootcamps, curriculum development, and business case competitions.

items.title: AI-Designed Peptide Therapeutics Show 80-90% Accuracy in Drug Discovery
items.summary: Medical student Anthony Wong's research using machine learning to design triple-agonist peptide therapeutics for type 2 diabetes and obesity achieved 80-90% validation accuracy. The computational approach significantly accelerates drug discovery timelines compared to traditional trial-and-error methods.

items.title: Halcyon Raises $21 Million Series A for AI-Powered Energy Industry Solutions
items.summary: Halcyon secured $21 million in Series A funding to bring AI-powered intelligence solutions to the energy sector, expanding its capabilities for industry-specific applications.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: OXMIQ Labs Partners with AM Intelligence Labs on 2 GW AI Compute Infrastructure
items.summary: OXMIQ Labs, founded by Raja Koduri, announced a strategic partnership with AM Intelligence Labs to provide data center and system infrastructure advisory for a 2 GW AI compute capability by 2030, with an initial 1 GW hub planned for Uttar Pradesh, India.

items.title: Korean Research Team Develops 4D Printing Technology Using Sulfur Waste
items.summary: A joint research team led by Dr. Dong-Gyun Kim of KRICT developed the world's first 4D printing technology based on sulfur-rich polymers that respond to heat, light, and magnetic fields, enabling self-actuating and recyclable structures from petroleum refining waste.

items.title: Johns Hopkins Endorses Agentic AI Platform for Toxicological Risk Assessment
items.summary: Dr. Thomas Hartung, Director of the Center for Alternatives to Animal Testing at Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health, endorsed the public launch of an agentic AI platform by Insilica Inc. that produces comprehensive toxicological risk assessments in hours.
